description.en: Basic editing tools, limited to 50 monthly credits
description.zh: 基本编辑工具，每月50积分限制

weaknesses.en: Limited features and credits in the free tier
weaknesses.zh: 免费版功能和积分有限

weaknesses.en: No pricing information for premium tiers
weaknesses.zh: 未明确说明高级套餐价格

targetAudience.zh: 初学者视频编辑者和爱好者

positioning.en: Focuses on user-friendly AI tools for non-professional users
positioning.zh: 专注于为非专业人士提供易于使用的AI工具
